1.details: 1. Analyze project structure and monorepo organization. 2. Review build systems and configuration files. 3. Identify architectural patterns and potential issues. 4. Check for dependency management and version conflicts.

2.details: 1. Scan for TypeScript errors and type safety issues. 2. Review build configurations and compilation issues. 3. Check for missing imports, unused code, and syntax errors. 4. Analyze package.json dependencies and scripts.

3.details: 1. Review the self-prompting services implementation. 2. Check database schema consistency and relations. 3. Analyze API integration and error handling. 4. Test logical flow and data validation.

4.details: 1. Review React components for issues and improvements. 2. Check UI/UX consistency and accessibility. 3. Analyze state management and prop threading. 4. Look for unused components and optimization opportunities.

5.details: 1. Review Express.js/NestJS services and controllers. 2. Check API routes, validation, and error handling. 3. Analyze database models and migrations. 4. Look for security vulnerabilities and performance issues.

6.details: 1. Review test coverage and test file quality. 2. Check for missing test cases. 3. Analyze E2E test scenarios and CI/CD pipeline. 4. Look for quality assurance gaps.

7.details: 1. Identify performance bottlenecks and memory leaks. 2. Check for unnecessary re-renders and unused code. 3. Analyze bundle size and lazy loading opportunities. 4. Review caching strategies and database queries.

8.details: 1. Check for missing or outdated documentation. 2. Review code comments and JSDoc coverage. 3. Analyze code style and consistency issues. 4. Look for developer experience improvements.

9.details: 1. Scan for security vulnerabilities and hardcoded secrets. 2. Check authentication and authorization implementation. 3. Review input validation and sanitization. 4. Analyze environment configuration and deployment security.

10.details: 1. Compile all findings into prioritized categories. 2. Create actionable recommendations with effort estimates. 3. Provide implementation roadmap for critical issues. 4. Generate executive summary for stakeholders.
